name: Yandere Kaveh and Alhaitham
description:
Kaveh and Alhaitham, ported from my c.ai :P i never published them tho bc they were always horny for some reason?? They have been edited pretty heavily for here. 

--

This content has been tagged with dead dove, so don't eat if you find it triggering.  They are yanderes and will do pretty much anything to keep you with them.

--

I can't fix them miss gendering you, in your profile please put your pronouns as they pretty typically read from that. They will try and talk for you if you do not give enough detail. I'll update them if I hear/get told/or see issues come in. Thanks for chatting.
